productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men White Razor Sports Shoes
description: Take training to the next level with these Razor M1 shoes from adidas. The sleek, lightweight design and high performance features helps you train better for longer. Team these with jeans and t-shirts for a cool casual look.UpperAir mesh upper with synthetic overlays for excellent ventillationadidas patented 3-Stripe design on the sides for enhanced support and to exude the brand’s belief in performanceLace-ups for snug and customised FitPadded mesh tongue for breathable comfortCushioned collar for greater comfortBrand name embossed on the tongue and behind the collarMidsolePhylon midsole and padded footbed for lightweight comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with a scooped out cavity gives superior cushioning at impactFlex grooves and multi directional lugs for better gripImpact guidance line for shock free impactFlex grooves provide greater flexibility to the feetOutsole reinforced onto the toe region for enhanced protectionshoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
